resources.string:
Welcome to this English speaking practice app.
1. Service Description This app contains an AI English coach based on open-source large language models. All AI inference runs locally on your device, completely offline. This product is for English speaking practice only.
2. AI Content Disclaimer AI-generated replies are produced by local models automatically. They do not reflect the views of the developer or any organization. Due to the limitations of on-device small models, AI may occasionally produce inaccurate or inappropriate content. Please use your judgment and do not take everything as absolute truth.
3. Compliance You agree not to intentionally induce AI to generate content that is illegal, pornographic, violent, or infringes on others' rights. The developer is not responsible for any consequences arising from improper use.
4. Privacy Protection This app runs completely offline. Your conversation data will not be uploaded to any server, nor collected or shared. However, please do not enter bank card passwords, ID numbers, or other sensitive personal information in conversations.
5. Minor Reminder If you are a minor, please use this product under the guidance of a guardian.
If you do not agree to the above terms, please exit this app. Continuing to use means you have read, understood, and agreed to all terms.
AI generated content is for reference only. Please do not take it as absolute truth or reveal private information.
